description: Acquire the fully powered Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. You will get the dual-portal gun in Test Chamber 11.

description: Do whatever it takes to survive.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Incinerate the Weighted Companion Cube to proceed.

description: Make the correct party escort submission position decision.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Escape the fire pit at the end of Test Chamber 19.
Unmissable story achievement. Defeat GLaDOS at the end of the game.
Place one portal on the ceiling and one directly below it on the floor. Jump in and fall continuously for about 5 minutes until the achievement pops.
Best done in the large open areas of Test Chamber 15 or 19. Build up extreme momentum by falling into a floor portal to launch yourself across a massive gap.
Accessible from the main menu after beating the game. Complete any 2 of the 6 Advanced Chambers.
Accessible from the main menu. Complete any 4 of the 6 Advanced Chambers.

description: Beat all six Portal advanced maps.
hint: Accessible from the main menu. Complete all 6 Advanced Chambers. They are harder versions of Chambers 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, and 18.

description: Earn bronze medals on all Portal challenges.
hint: Complete the Portals, Steps, and Time challenges for Chambers 13-18 with at least a Bronze rating.

description: Earn silver medals on all Portal challenges.
hint: Complete the Portals, Steps, and Time challenges for Chambers 13-18 with at least a Silver rating.

description: Earn gold medals on all Portal challenges.
hint: Complete the Portals, Steps, and Time challenges for Chambers 13-18 with a Gold rating. Look up speedrun or low-portal routing guides.

description: Detach security cameras from the walls.
hint: There are 33 wall-mounted cameras throughout the game. Knock them off by shooting a portal directly onto the wall they are attached to, or by throwing a cube at them.

description: Knock down a turret with another turret.
hint: Pick up an active or disabled turret and physically drop/throw it onto a second standing turret to knock it over.
Find all 26 hidden radios in the game (added during the 2010 ARG) and carry them to specific locations in their respective chambers until the red light turns green and you hear static/Morse code.
